summary: A Fox News broadcast clip of Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer speaking at a White House cabinet meeting, under a 'TRUMP CABINET WEIGHS IN ON FIRST 100 DAYS OF TERM' chyron, touting 80,000 new apprenticeships since January. It is unedited TV news footage with no music or genre styling, so out of scope.
notable_text: THE WHITE HOUSE LIVE; FOX NEWS BREAKING NEWS; LORI CHAVEZ-DEREMER | LABOR SECRETARY; TRUMP CABINET WEIGHS IN ON FIRST 100 DAYS OF TERM
